productDisplayName: Reebok Men Walk Max Velcro White Sports Shoes
description: Offering superior comfort for those who love those long walks, the reebok Walk Max Velcro comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays and stitch detailingMeshed tongue and fabric inner lining for breathable comfortVelcro straps on the midfoot for a custom FitPadded tongue and collar, and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs engineered with moving air technology for enhanced cushioned comfort and easy forward movementTransition bridge for easy heel-strike to toe-offshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
